identity.name: 1233 Yonge Street
identity.address: 1233 Yonge St & 9 Woodlawn Ave E, Toronto, ON (SE corner Yonge & Woodlawn)

narrative.summary: The most controversial development in Summerhill. Originally a modest 13-storey proposal, it has ballooned to 49-53 storeys — right at Summerhill Station. Replaces an existing 3-storey rental building. Includes 40 rental replacement units. Grey brick base with white metal tower. The jump from 13 to 53 storeys is aggressive and has drawn significant neighbourhood opposition.

keyDates.label: Major revision
keyDates.note: Jumped to 49 storeys, 764 units — 36 extra storeys

keyDates.label: Latest revision
keyDates.note: Further increased to 53 storeys per UrbanToronto

keyDates.label: City committee hearing
keyDates.note: Bousfields presenting to committee — 2 weeks away!

development.developer: Plazacorp / Firm Capital (operating as 1233Y Development LP)
